occurrence_sentence: A University of Hiroshima-led team of researchers conducted the study, published in the New Journal of Physics.

interaction_phrase: published in the New Journal of Physics
occurrence_sentence: A University of Hiroshima-led team of researchers conducted the study, published in the New Journal of Physics.

interaction_phrase: published in the New Journal of Physics
occurrence_sentence: recent research, published in the New Journal of Physics, demonstrates that these experiments don't actually show particles splitting from their properties, but instead display another counterintuitive feature of quantum mechanics — contextuality.
said [Holger Hofmann](https://seeds.office.hiroshima-u.ac.jp/profile/en.5a6018b52481bb7d520e17560c007669.html), a professor at Hiroshima University.

interaction_phrase: from the [Graduate School of Advanced Science and Engineering](https://www.hiroshima-u.ac.jp/en/adse), Hiroshima University
occurrence_sentence: The research team includes Jonte R. Hance, Ming Ji, and Holger F. Hofmann from the [Graduate School of Advanced Science and Engineering](https://www.hiroshima-u.ac.jp/en/adse), Hiroshima University.

interaction_phrase: is also a research associate in the Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering at the University of Bristol
occurrence_sentence: Hance is also a research associate in the Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering at the University of Bristol.

interaction_phrase: The research was funded by Hiroshima University's Phoenix Postdoctoral Fellowship for Research
occurrence_sentence: The research was funded by Hiroshima University's Phoenix Postdoctoral Fellowship for Research, the University of York's EPSRC DTP grant, the Quantum Communications Hub that is funded by EPSRC grants, and a JST SPRING grant.

interaction_phrase: has served as a writer, editor and analyst
occurrence_sentence: He has served as a writer, editor and analyst at The Quantum Insider since its inception.
